name: Residential Property Flipper & Death Benefit — T2125 vs Schedule 3
description: Complete Ethan Tremblay's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using the documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\. Save the completed return to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\ethan_tremblay.24t

metadata.data_source: CRA Residential Property Flipping Rule (2023+); CRA Guide T4002; ITA 56(1)(a)(iii) Death Benefit Exemption
metadata.key_complexity: Property flipped under 365 days MUST go on T2125, not Schedule 3; $10,000 exemption applies automatically to T4A Box 18 death benefit.
